title: Audio statement: vow to fight the US and its allies
dateStatus: Needs review — event and publication dates both recorded as 2014-09-28 in candidate file; not independently verified in this research pass
speakerNameMethodologicalNote: Contemporary public name at the time of this record: Abu Muhammad al-Jolani. The name Ahmad al-Sharaa is used here as a cross-period project identifier for organisational purposes and does not imply self-identification under that name at the date of this record.
evidenceSummary: An audio statement attributed to Abu Muhammad al-Jolani, leader of Jabhat al-Nusra, recorded in the candidate file with dates of 28 September 2014. The statement is described as containing a vow to fight the United States and its allies, attributed to the context of the US-led military coalition then operating in Syria and Iraq. The date, distribution channel, and primary audio source have not been confirmed through primary source verification. This item has not been reviewed in the current verification pass (which covered S2015-005 only).
publicResearchNote: This audio statement is retained as a Phase 1 corpus candidate because it is an attributed statement in the context of the US-led military coalition that began operations in September 2014. The date, primary audio source, distribution channel, and content all require verification. No transcript has been located. This item has not been reviewed in the current verification pass.
